title: carex nigra f. subovalis
intro: Carex nigra f. subovalis, also known as Black Sedge, is a subspecies of the Carex nigra plant, a type of grass-like perennial that belongs to the sedge family. The medicinal properties of Carex nigra f. subovalis include its ability to act as a diuretic, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of using Carex nigra f. subovalis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Carex nigra f. subovalis can be used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
